# EmendaKit AS

EmendaKit is a Norwegian medical device company that designs, tests, and produces anaphylaxis kits ("anafylaksiskrin") for healthcare professionals. Founded by an anesthesiologist and a midwife with extensive experience in clinical practice and medical simulation. Based in Norway. Tagline: "Innovasjon gjennom kunnskap og erfaring" (Innovation through knowledge and experience).

## Products

EmendaKit Hospital — Anaphylaxis kit for healthcare professionals. Used in emergency departments, ambulances, helicopter air ambulances, maternity wards, vaccination stations, and general practice. Waterproof, shock-resistant, transparent polymer case (IP-67). Light-protected adrenaline compartment. Contents include adrenaline (1 mg/ml × 2 ampoules), antihistamine, corticosteroid, syringes, needles, infusion sets. Includes printed Norwegian national anaphylaxis flowchart on the lid and a QR code linking to two training videos. Dimensions 320 × 230 × 95 mm, weight 1.4 kg. Price on request. Delivery time approximately 2 weeks. URL: https://www.emendakit.com/produkt/emendakit-hospital

EmendaKit Dentist — Anaphylaxis kit specifically designed for dental clinics, including oral surgery and orthodontics. Compact format (260 × 180 × 80 mm, 1.1 kg) tailored to anaphylactic reactions to local anesthetics and latex — the two most common triggers in dental practice. Same framework as EmendaKit Hospital, sized for a treatment room. Price on request. Delivery time approximately 2 weeks. URL: https://www.emendakit.com/produkt/emendakit-dentist

Custom kits ("behovstilpassede medisinske skrin") — Co-design service for healthcare departments with specific needs (maternity wards, vaccination programs, ambulance services, units with special requirements). Process: design conversation, content proposal, pilot units, refinement, delivery. Free initial design conversation by emailing kjersti@emendakit.com. URL: https://www.emendakit.com/tjenester/behovstilpasset

## Founders

Kjersti Grinde — co-founder, midwife, certified medical simulation facilitator. Specializes in quality improvement and clinical training in Norwegian healthcare.

Gregers Halvorsen — co-founder, anesthesiologist at Helse Førde, with experience from Norwegian air ambulance service. Certified medical simulation facilitator.

## Clinical foundation

All products follow the Norwegian national anaphylaxis treatment protocol (revision 2024). The flowchart is printed on the back of every kit's lid. QR code on the kit's side opens two short training videos directly in browser. Free transcripts of all training videos are available at https://www.emendakit.com/opplaering

## Contact

All inquiries: kjersti@emendakit.com
Quote requests: kjersti@emendakit.com (subject "Be om tilbud")

EmendaKit AS, Norway. © 2026.

---

# EmendaKit AS — English summary

EmendaKit is a Norwegian medical device company that designs, tests, and produces anaphylaxis emergency kits for healthcare professionals. Designed, tested, and manufactured in Norway. Co-founded by an anesthesiologist and a midwife. The company's philosophy: "an emergency kit is not a product — it is part of the procedure, and must be treated accordingly."

Two standard products: EmendaKit Hospital (for hospitals, ambulances, maternity wards, vaccination stations) and EmendaKit Dentist (for dental clinics, oral surgery, orthodontics — sized and packed for local-anesthetic and latex anaphylaxis). Plus a custom-kit service co-developed with healthcare departments.

All kits are waterproof, shock-resistant, IP-67-rated. Each comes packed according to the latest Norwegian national anaphylaxis protocol with a printed flowchart on the lid and a QR code linking to two short clinician-facing training films. Pricing on request. Lead time approximately 2 weeks. Direct contact: kjersti@emendakit.com.
